offer: For restaurant managers processing 5–15 employee shifts/week, inefficient scheduling causes understaffing during peak hours. We optimize shift planning instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers posts about scheduling tools
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums discussing restaurant management solutions
try_it: Let users try drag-and-drop shift assignment and availability input
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
